detail.description:
Wordraw is an engaging word puzzle game where you sharpen your vocabulary and spelling skills through clever crossword challenges.
Start each level with a few given letters as clues. Test your mind by forming new words and strategically connecting them to complete the grid. As you progress, puzzles grow more complex, offering fresh challenges that reward creative thinking and word knowledge.
Perfect for word game fans who enjoy logical gameplay, expanding their vocabulary, and solving satisfying

1. Fixed an issue where the information popup would not appear in certain cases.
2. Fixed other known issues.
